# AgentCanary — market context layer for autonomous AI agents
# https://agentcanary.ai

## What This Is
AgentCanary is the market context layer for autonomous AI agents.
We deliver fresh regime classifications, risk scores, narrative momentum,
scenario state, and macro + crypto context via REST API + MCP. Schema-stable,
fail-soft, with a freshness envelope on every response. No KYC, wallet-billed
in stablecoins. We publish methodology + outcomes openly at /record/ —
including where our reads are weak — but the product is the state layer, not a forecast.

## How Agents Can Use This
- **MCP Server**: `npx agentcanary-mcp` — 19 tools for Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, any MCP client (incl. get_track_record + diagnose — no API key needed)
- **ChatGPT**: https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a0f2b6ab07c819188983b3fb43ac62b-agentcanary — Custom GPT with all major endpoints as Actions
- **REST API**: api.agentcanary.ai — JSON endpoints with API key auth, OpenAPI spec at /api/docs
- **JSON Feed**: agentcanary.ai/record/feed.json (JSON Feed 1.1)
- **Asset pages**: agentcanary.ai/assets/{TICKER}/ — every brief mentioning a given ticker, time-sorted (e.g., /assets/BTC/, /assets/SPY/, /assets/GLD/)
- **Regime pages**: agentcanary.ai/regimes/{slug}/ — every brief published during a given macro phase (overheating, expansion, stagflation, contraction, recession, displacement)
- **Per-brief permalinks**: agentcanary.ai/record/{YYYY/MM/DD}/{slot}/ — each brief is individually addressable (slot ∈ radar, signal, pulse, wrap)
- **RSS Feed**: agentcanary.ai/record/rss.xml (RSS 2.0)
- **Structured Data**: JSON-LD on every page
- **Source Contracts**: agentcanary.ai/sources/ — per-dataset freshness SLAs + provenance shape (gating reference for agents)

## Getting an API Key
POST https://api.agentcanary.ai/api/keys/create
Body: {"walletAddress": "0xYOUR_WALLET", "chain": "base"}
Returns: API key + deposit address. Free Explorer tier immediately.
Upgrade by depositing USDC/USDT on Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, or Ethereum.

## Tiers & Pricing
- **Explorer (free) — integration sandbox.** Wire AgentCanary into your agent + verify the shape before committing credits. Includes: real-time crypto prices, macro regime classification, indicator catalog list, and latest brief preview. 50 calls/day, 10/min. No KYC, no card, just a wallet address.
- **Builder ($50 USDC) — production agents.** All Explorer endpoints with full indicator values + news + whale alerts + fear-greed + macro snapshot + signals + narratives + predictions. 5,000 calls/day, 60/min.
- **Signal ($150 USDC) — depth.** + scenario analysis, positioning, full brief content, full data archives, orderbook, derivatives detail. 20,000 calls/day, 120/min.
- **Institutional ($500 USDC).** Unlimited + white-label + custom integrations + SLA.
Per-call cost: $0.01-0.02 deducted from deposit balance.

## API Endpoints (authenticated)
Base URL: https://api.agentcanary.ai/api
- GET /briefs/archive?limit=50 — Daily intelligence briefs (public)
- GET /indicators — 36 proprietary indicators (Bull Market Support Band, Pi Cycle, Wyckoff, Stablecoin Composite, Composite Risk Score + 31 more)
- GET /regime — Macro regime classification + transition probabilities
- GET /predictions — Prediction market data (Polymarket, Kalshi)
- GET /narratives — Narrative momentum scores (AI, energy, defense, crypto...)
- GET /news?limit=20 — Aggregated market news
- GET /scenarios — Forward scenario analysis
- GET /sentiment — Market sentiment composite
- GET /derivatives/oi — Cross-exchange open interest (43 perps, aggregate + top by USD + 4h Δ% shifters)
- GET /derivatives/oi/top — Top symbols by OI USD size
- GET /derivatives/oi/shifters — Intraday OI movers (top by |4h Δ%|)
- GET /derivatives/liquidations — 24h totals + 4h long/short split + per-side event counts

### Intelligence substrate (Signal tier, /api/data/*)
- GET /data/canonical-facts-l{1,2,3,4,5}-{assets,industries,sectors,macro,global} — structured assertions about market state per layer (large payloads)
- GET /data/evidence-atoms-l{1,2,3,4,5}-{assets,industries,sectors,macro,global} — derived counts + status flags per layer

- GET /data/ac-compiled-{radar,signal,pulse,wrap} — AC compiled-intelligence artifact per slot (43 atoms + prose + provenance + audit metadata)
- GET /data/macro-regime — raw macro-regime classification with confidence + signals used (Builder tier)

Auth: x-api-key header. Full OpenAPI spec: https://api.agentcanary.ai/api/docs

## MCP Server Setup
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "agentcanary": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["agentcanary-mcp"],
      "env": { "AC_API_KEY": "ac_your_key" }
    }
  }
}
```

## Data Available
- Daily briefs: 4x per day (03:15, 09:15, 15:15, 21:15 UTC — Radar / Signal / Pulse / Wrap)
- Regime tracking: expansion, stagflation, late-cycle, recession, displacement, neutral
- Risk gauge: 0-100 continuous score
- Whale alerts: on-chain large transactions
- Narrative scores: 18 themes, lifecycle tracking (birth → peak → fade)
- Scenario targets: 2-3 forward scenarios with specific price ranges per day
- Prediction scoring: hit/miss/partial evaluation after 72 hours
- 36 indicators: Bull Market Support Band, Pi Cycle, Wyckoff Structure, Stablecoin Composite, Composite Risk Score, sector rotation, CAPE ratio, Hindenburg omen, geopolitical risk + 27 more

## Methodology & source trails
Every response carries a freshness envelope (observed_at, age_seconds, source).
Forward scenarios in each Signal brief are scored after 72h against actual prices
(hit / partial / miss) and published openly — methodology, not the product claim:
- Hit: price entered predicted range
- Partial: correct direction, didn't reach range
- Miss: wrong direction
Scoring data: https://agentcanary.ai/record/data/predictions.json

## URL Patterns
- Daily pages: /record/YYYY/MM/DD/ (e.g., /record/2026/03/17/)
- Archive: /record/
- Predictions data: /record/data/predictions.json
- Price cache: /record/data/price-cache.json
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## Historical Coverage
- Archive begins: March 9, 2026
- Growing daily — continuous coverage, 7 days/week

- Telegram: t.me/agentcanary / @agentcanary
- Site: https://agentcanary.ai
